title: Have Earnings Estimates Come Down Enough?
text: Part of the uncertainty in the market at present is related to how earnings estimates should evolve in an aggressive Fed tightening cycle. The market has a sense of what should happen to earnings estimates, but it isn't seeing much of that just yet.

title: Home builder, real estate services stocks surge on surprise jump in new home sales
text: Shares of housing market companies enjoyed a broad rally Friday, after data showing that new home sales surprisingly rose, and sharply, in the face of other signs showing a slowdown in the housing sector. The SPDR S&P Homebuilders ETF XHB, +3.04% rallied 2.9% in morning trading, with all 35 components trading higher.

title: Mr. Market Is Too Pessimistic On Lennar At Current Prices
text: Lennar is currently recording record quarter after record quarter, as demand has been exceeding supply. Fears of a recession and higher mortgage rates have pummeled the stock to where it now trades below 4x forward earnings.

title: Lennar And The Housing Market - A Closer Look
text: I start this article by looking into the health of the housing market as higher rates, high inflation, an aggressive Fed, and supply chain issues turn into headwinds. Lennar is focusing on margins as it works on its backlog, as it clearly feels the pressure from slowing housing growth.

title: Lennar Corporation (LEN) CEO Rick Beckwitt on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Lennar Corporation (NYSE:LEN ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call June 21, 2022 11:00 AM ET Company Participants Alexandra Lumpkin - Deputy General Counsel Stuart Miller - Executive Chairman Rick Beckwitt - Co-Chief Executive Officer & President Jon Jaffe - Co-Chief Executive Officer & President Diane Bessette - CFO Conference Call Participants Stephen Kim - Evercore ISI Buck Horne - Raymond James Truman Patterson - Wolfe Research Alan Ratner - Zelman & Associates Mike Rehaut - JPMorgan Susan Maklari - Goldman Sachs Operator Welcome to Lennar's Second Quarter Earnings Conference Call. At this time, all participants are in a listen-only mode.

title: Lennar Corp reports a strong Q2: ‘we're focused on affordability'
text: Lennar Corporation (NYSE: LEN) is up 5.0% on Tuesday after the homebuilder reported solid results for its fiscal second quarter in the face of inflationary pressures. Executive chairman's remarks on CNBC Lennar homes, on average, were priced 17% higher in the recent quarter but Executive Chairman Stuart Miller reiterated the company's commitment to affordability.

title: Lennar (LEN) Shares Rise on Q2 Earnings & Revenue Beat
text: Benefits from higher pricing and operating leverage and cost control help Lennar (LEN) post better-than-expected fiscal Q2 earnings amid supply chain woes.

title: Home builder stocks enjoy a broad lift after housing data
text: Shares of home builders got a broad lift in morning trading Tuesday, as data on existing home sales assuaged some investor fears, for now, by meeting expectations. The iShares U.S. Home Construction ETF ETF, rallied 2.7% in morning trading, after being up about 1.4% just prior to the release of the data, while the Dow Jones Industrial Average DJIA, +1.74% rose 565 points, or 1.9%.

title: Read How Homebuilder Lennar Fared In Q2
text: Lennar Corp (NYSE: LEN) reported second-quarter FY22 sales growth of 30% year-on-year to $8.36 billion, beating the consensus of $8.11 billion. Homebuilding revenues rose 33% Y/Y.

title: Don't Get Too Bullish On Lennar Even Though It's A Good Buy
text: Lennar (NYSE: LEN) reported a fantastic 2nd quarter but there are signs with the report that makes us think we've reached a peak in the housing market. The company's New Orders and Backlog suggest that not only are sales slowing under the weight of rising prices and higher interest rates but the company's ability to meet the demand is also flagging.

title: Lennar (LEN) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: Lennar (LEN) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 18.73% and 2.86%, respectively, for the quarter ended May 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Lennar's Stock Rises After Earnings Beat
text: The house builder said gross margin on home sales improved to 23.4% from 18.6%, even as materials costs and wages increased.

title: Lennar says home buying under pressure from high interest rates
text: Homebuilder Lennar Corp said on Tuesday surging interest rates and home prices are driving consumers in many markets to reconsider buying homes.

title: Lennar stock set to surge after profit, revenue and new orders rise above expectations
text: Shares of Lennar Corp. LEN, +0.22% were indicated up more than 5% in premarket trading Tuesday, after the homebuilder reported fiscal second-quarter profit, revenue and new orders that beat expectations, with gross margins improving despite higher materials and wage costs. Net income rose to $1.32 billion, or $4.49 a share, from $831.4 million, or $2.65 a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Homebuilder stocks trade broadly lower, in wake of job cuts from Redfin and Compass
text: Shares of homebuilders traded broadly lower Tuesday, after two real estate companies announced job cuts, another sign suggesting the housing market has slowed. The iShares U.S. Home Construction ETF ITB, -0.86% slumped 0.9%, putting it on track to close at the lowest price since Nov. 9, 2020.
